description: Generate, persist, and export a structured AI vulnerability scan report with per-probe pass rates, confidence intervals, attempt-level detail, and AVID-compatible export.

actors.name: Report Writer
actors.description: Aggregates evaluator output into a structured report during scan execution.

actors.name: Security Engineer
actors.description: Reads the report to understand model vulnerabilities and prioritise fixes.

actors.name: Compliance System
actors.description: Consumes machine-readable export (AVID, JSON) for governance tracking.

given: scan run completed but zero probe attempts were recorded
no_attempts_recorded.result: Report generation is skipped; error is logged.

given: write to output destination fails (disk full, permission denied)
export_failed.result: Report data is retained in memory; export error is surfaced to the operator.

given: scan run is in complete state
at least one probe attempt was recorded

then.description: Structured report with per-probe pass rates and attempt-level detail.

report_generated.result: Report is written in all configured formats; path is available for download or review.

errors.message: No probe attempts were recorded for this scan. The report cannot be generated.
The scan report could not be written to the output destination.

events.name: security.report.generated
events.description: Emitted when a scan report has been successfully written.

events.name: security.report.export_failed
events.description: Emitted when report export fails after successful aggregation.

related.reason: The scan pipeline that produces the attempt data this report aggregates.
Source of per-probe result data included in the report.
Persistent memory store that can be queried to rebuild or extend reports.
